arabicText: إِنَّ الِاتِّبَاعَ لِلشَّرِيعَةِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ الْأَصِيلُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْقَوْمِ
latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ الَّتِي لَا شَرِيعَةَ مَعَهَا بَاطِلَةٌ وَمَرْدُودَةٌ بِالْيَقِينِ
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth (Haqiqa) that is not accompanied by sacred law (Sharia) is falsehood and rejected with certainty.
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo.
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ جُ سِلْ جُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ شَرِيعَ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ دَنْ كُيْ دِلُّو

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالتَّمَسُّكِ بِالْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فِي السُّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دائماً
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bit-tamassuki bil-kitābi was-sunnati fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā
englishTranslation: You must hold fast to the Book and the Sunnah in private and in public at all times.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa bopp Alxuraan ak Sunnah ci lëndëm ak ci leer.
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ سِ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ اَكْ سِ لِيرْ

arabicText: إِنَّ الِاتِّبَاعَ لِلشَّرِيعَةِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ الْأَصِيلُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْقَوْمِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm (5)
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ [5]

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd (6)
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ [6]

latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn (7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo. (Wers 7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa bopp Alxuraan ak Sunnah ci lëndëm ak ci leer. (Wers 8)

wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ [25]

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ [26]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd (26)
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ [26]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ الَّتِي لَا شَرِيعَةَ مَعَهَا بَاطِلَةٌ وَمَرْدُودَةٌ بِالْيَقِينِ [27]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn (27)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth (Haqiqa) that is not accompanied by sacred law (Sharia) is falsehood and rejected with certainty. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ جُ سِلْ جُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ شَرِيعَ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ دَنْ كُيْ دِلُّو [27]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالتَّمَسُّكِ بِالْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فِي السُّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دائماً [28]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bit-tamassuki bil-kitābi was-sunnati fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā (28)
englishTranslation: You must hold fast to the Book and the Sunnah in private and in public at all times. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa bopp Alxuraan ak Sunnah ci lëndëm ak ci leer. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ سِ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ اَكْ سِ لِيرْ [28]

arabicText: إِنَّ الِاتِّبَاعَ لِلشَّرِيعَةِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ الْأَصِيلُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْقَوْمِ [29]
latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm (29)
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ [29]

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ [30]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd (30)
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ [30]

latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn (31)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth (Haqiqa) that is not accompanied by sacred law (Sharia) is falsehood and rejected with certainty. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo. (Wers 31)

latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bit-tamassuki bil-kitābi was-sunnati fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā (32)
englishTranslation: You must hold fast to the Book and the Sunnah in private and in public at all times. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa bopp Alxuraan ak Sunnah ci lëndëm ak ci leer. (Wers 32)

latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm (33)
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf. (Wers 33)
